analysis.summary: The technician connected to a client computer and used Veeam Backup & Replication Explorer to restore the 'Administrator' mailbox from a backup of 'SRV01' using Veeam Explorer for Microsoft Exchange. The restore process completed successfully.
actions_taken: Logged into the client computer as Administrator
Opened File Explorer and navigated to the Veeam Backup & Replication installation directory
Connected to the backup server using Administrator credentials
Initiated 'Restore application items' for 'Microsoft Exchange' for SRV01
Launched Veeam Explorer for Microsoft Exchange and connected to the backup server
Used the 'Find mailboxes' feature to locate the 'Administrator' mailbox
Selected the 'Inbox' folder of the 'Administrator' mailbox
Performed a 'Restore to original location' for the Inbox to SRV01
Provided Administrator credentials for SRV01 to complete the restore
Monitored the restore session until successful completion
Closed Veeam Explorer for Microsoft Exchange and Veeam Backup & Replication Explorer
issues_resolved: Mailbox data for the 'Administrator' user on 'SRV01' was successfully restored from a Veeam backup.

tech_performance.efficiency_notes: The technician worked very methodically and directly, navigating the Veeam interfaces efficiently to perform the mailbox restore without hesitation.
